amount.description: The amount (in cents) to transfer from originating account to receiving account.

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code of the transfer amount

memo.description: A short note to the recipient

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata to associate with the transaction

originating_account_alias.description: An alias representing a GL account to debit. This is alternative to specifying by account id

originating_account_customer_id.description: The customer id of the owner of the originating account.

originating_account_id.description: The UUID of the account being debited

receiving_account_alias.description: An alias representing a GL account to credit. This is an alternative to specifying by account id

receiving_account_customer_id.description: The customer id of the owner of the receiving account. Only required when type is "outgoing_remittance"

receiving_account_id.description: The UUID of the account being credited

type.description: The desired transaction type to use for this transfer
